title: Available Payment Term
description: A payment term offered by the business, defining how line items can be paid for over time.

id.description: Unique identifier for this payment term.

name.description: Human-readable name for this payment term, such as `Pay Now`, `Net-30`, `Pay in 4`, or `Deposit + Balance at Check-in`.

description.description: Optional buyer-facing explanation of the payment term.

schedules.description: Payment schedules within this term defining when payments are due, if used.
